title: Tessera Embedding Convention (tessera:)
description: Schema for quantised geospatial embedding vectors in Zarr. Properties use the 'tessera:' namespace prefix. This convention defines the store layout, dequantisation contract, and metadata for tessera embedding stores.

node_type.description: Type of Zarr node (tessera convention applies to groups only)

attributes.description: Zarr attributes containing convention metadata and tessera: prefixed properties

conventionMetadata.description: Tessera convention metadata object for use in zarr_conventions array

schema_url.description: URL to the JSON Schema definition for this convention

spec_url.description: URL to the full specification document

uuid.description: UUID that permanently identifies this convention

name.description: Human-readable name of the convention with colon to indicate key-prefixing

description.const: Quantised geospatial embedding vectors with per-pixel dequantisation scales
description.description: Brief description of the convention's purpose and usage

tesseraAttributes.description: Tessera embedding properties using tessera: key prefix

tessera:dataset_version.description: Version of the tessera data schema (e.g., 'v1')

tessera:year.description: Calendar year for which the embeddings were computed

tessera:n_tiles.description: Number of source tiles merged into this zone

tessera:model_version.description: Version of the embedding model that produced the vectors

tessera:build_version.description: Version of the software that built this store

tessera:has_rgb_preview.description: Whether this zone group contains a populated RGB preview array
